{"id":"hq-b5qvm","title":"Plugin: dolt-archive","description":"Execute the following plugin script:

**Plugin**: dolt-archive
**Description**: Offsite backup: JSONL snapshots to git, dolt push to GitHub/DoltHub

```bash
cd /Users/kingb/gt/plugins/dolt-archive && bash run.sh
```

Run this command EXACTLY. Do NOT interpret the plugin.md instructions.
Do NOT write your own implementation. Just run the script and report the output.

After completion:
1. Create a wisp to record the result (success/failure)
2. Run `gt dog done` — this clears your work and auto-terminates the session
